assignments.name: Assign_Opp_Values_to_tmp_Variable
assignments.label: Assign Opp Values to tmp Variable

assignments.name: Change_Original_CW_Opp_to_Child_Opp
assignments.label: Change Original CW Opp to Child Opp

Flow.description:
When a Multi-Site Opportunity is CW, it creates Child Site records with the info needed to set up child Accounts, Opportunities, and Combined Funnel records. This flow takes care of creating and prepopulating all those child records.
04/10/25 - PE - Updating mapping for Billing Intervals 04/14/25 - PE - Added mapping to AE Owner on Child Accounts CF to Child opportunity. 04/17/25 - PE - Added formula to set right opportunity record type. 07/30/25 - AC - Added mapping to Original Close Date and Government Close Date to Child Account creation. 08/01/25 - AC - Added Update Account Original Close Date node. 10/08/2025 - LK - Updated the Account - to also update the "Most Recent Saas CW Opportunity" field when the new child opportunities are created. 2/6/26 - DM- Removed references to 'OBC Owner' (deprecating field) 2/26/26 - AC - Split the Account creating node between SaaS and Gov as to not assign Billing Activation Start Date on Child Gov Account creation 03/17/26 - AC - Added condition to create Onboarding Attempts for Site Adds as they're skipping the SaaS CW flow.

formulas.name: for_AcctBillingActivationStartDate
formulas.expression: IF( OR( AND( {!$Record.Same_Billing_Status_at_CW_as_the_Parent__c} = "Yes", ISPICKVAL({!Get_Original_CW_Opportunity.Billing_Status_at_CW__c}, "Opted In")), {!$Record.Billing_Status_at_Closed_Won__c} = "Opted In"), {!$Flow.CurrentDate}, Null )

formulas.name: for_CombinedFunnelName
formulas.expression: IF( LEN({!$Record.Child_Site_Name__c} & ' - Combined Funnel') > 80, LEFT({!$Record.Child_Site_Name__c} , 80 - LEN(' - Combined Funnel')) & ' - Combined Funnel', {!$Record.Child_Site_Name__c} & ' - Combined Funnel' )

formulas.description: Formula to populate the "Most Recent SaaS CW Opportunity" based on whether the Child opportunity is Gov or not.
formulas.name: for_MostRecentGovOpp

formulas.description: Formula to populate the "Most Recent SaaS CW Opportunity" based on whether the Child opportunity is SaaS or not.
formulas.name: for_RecentSaasCWOpp

Flow.label: Child Site Creation - After Save - Create Child Records

value.stringValue: SaaS Opp CW - Create Combined Funnel and Onboardings
SaaS Opp CW - Create Combined Funnel and Onboardings

recordUpdates.name: Update_Triggering_Account_if_Site_Add
recordUpdates.label: Update Triggering Account if Site Add
